title: GK1H Enchants
description: Mod with enchantment-related changes made by GK1H.
body:
Mod with enchantment-related changes made by GK1H.

Features

Tradeable Wind Burst & Swift Sneak

Librarian villagers can give wind burst and swift sneak via trading.

Enchantability Changes

Changes to enchantability of items, requires Universal Enchants.

Links

CurseForge
